case_for: Kelce remains Mahomes' top target and consensus projection of 15.9 suggests strong expected usage, with week 4 showing signs of a return to form at 15.9 pts.
case_against: His last three regular-season games before week 4 (1.6, 7.0, 6.4) show a concerning downward trend and inconsistency that could easily produce another sub-12 outing.
